# Gap Analysis

## Summary

Cross-referencing the mockup screens against the database schema to identify missing tables, views, and API endpoints.

| Screen | DB tables needed | Status |
|--------|-----------------|--------|
| Observatory | sessions, metrics | partial |
| Sessions | sessions, events | exists |
| Libraries | libraries, library_pages | exists |
